jobs.name: Skechers USA, Inc.
jobs.summary: Designing and building the UI of an enterprise mobile app in React Native; the app is used at on-site events to streamline payroll deduction purchases of our work shoes. Also building UIs (React) and server-side logic (Scala/Play) of various internal web apps that automate workflows for sales analysts and key people in customer service.

projects.name: Tensai
projects.summary: I am the sole iOS developer for Tensai, which is a trivia app. Tensai generates a quiz of random trivia questions for the player to answer. The app is still in development.

projects.name: React Partitions
projects.summary: I am the sole developer for React Partitions, which is an interactive web app where users can animate bijections of integer partitions with Ferrers diagrams.
projects.role: Sole web app developer from new project to deployment.
